response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack/web software engineer with strong experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, deep neural network training/inference optimization, and GPU architecture analysis. Nothing in the resume demonstrates hardware-software co-design, performance modeling of accelerators, SIMD/MIMD architecture work, or AI workload optimization at the silicon level. The only adjacent experience is brief C/C++ work on a measurement IDE at National Instruments a decade ago, which is not relevant to performance architecture for AI chips.
strengths: Long engineering tenure (15+ years) easily satisfies the bachelor's + 8 years experience path
Polyglot background including C/C++, DLang, and low-latency systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Demonstrated ability to learn diverse stacks (embedded, web, mobile, GIS, AI tooling at Naver)
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience, which is a core required skill
No deep learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator background
Career trajectory is full-stack/product engineering, not hardware-software co-design or performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware-software co-design
No AI accelerator or DNN performance optimization experience
Meets the bachelor's + 8 years experience baseline
